Name: Average time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Payment Handled
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time between Request Payment and Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time for Payment Handled grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Payment Handled' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Average time it takes Payment Handled after the execution of Request Payment in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time for Payment Handled in cases where the process variant includes Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER versus variants that bypass pre-approval
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Payment Handled' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Payment Handled in variants that contain at least one Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time between Request Payment and Payment Handled in successful reimbursement paths (ending in Payment Handled) that previously experienced a rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total resolution time of Payment Handled in cases originating from domestic declarations (inferred from absence of pre-approval steps)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Payment Handled' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER does not occur

Name: Average time it takes Payment Handled to be done after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR, comparing paths with and without intermediate rejections by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to Payment Handled in variants that do not include any rejection events
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Payment Handled in variants that go through Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER without rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average waiting time to the Payment Handled after Request Payment in cases that had prior rework due to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time for Payment Handled in variants that include exactly one cycle of Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER followed by resubmission
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Payment Handled' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Minimum time for Payment Handled in cases where the supervisor and budget owner are the same (inferred from shorter approval chains ending directly in Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Payment Handled and the end of the case
